warnings: RISK-003 is mitigated for MVP by delegating public contribution checkout, KYC, refunds, disputes, and organizer payout to an external crowdfunding/payment provider.
Stage 3 must model an ExternalContributionProvider boundary and must not design Crewly-owned pooled payment processing for MVP.
Stage 5 must select and validate the specific external provider before implementation.
Public supporter contribution intent for ordinary social trips is plausible but not yet validated through user testing.
Business viability depends on unvalidated willingness-to-pay, fee tolerance, and usage cost assumptions.
next_actions: Begin Stage 3 system architecture using the Stage 2 handoff.
Model public contribution handling through an external provider boundary.
Preserve trip ledger, event ledger, receipt source-of-truth, privacy, and audit constraints.
Carry external provider selection and provider API/export validation into Stage 5.
